message:
✨ sort leaderboard by level desc + add sparkle for badge participants (#1510)

- Default sort: highest level first, then alphabetical a→z
- Add ✨ sparkle icon next to projects displaying ACMM badge on README
- 7 participants detected: kubestellar/console, kubestellar/kubestellar,
  kitops-ml/kitops, cadence-workflow/cadence, easegress-io/easegress,
  kmesh-net/kmesh, kube-vip/kube-vip
- Fix levelCounts to include L0 and L6
- Add legend showing participant count

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
